_comment: Known false-positive patterns for css-effective-audit.mjs. A rule whose
FULL selector matches any regex below is diverted out of the 'dead' verdict
into a separate keptDynamic bucket — it renders at runtime via a mechanism
the static crawl cannot exercise (JS-injected classes, template-literal
class names). Keep this list SURGICAL: only add a pattern after verifying the
runtime source. Do NOT add state-gated app classes here — those belong to the
JS-mounted-state pass (modals/dropdowns/open), not to permanent ignores.
Each entry: { pattern (JS regex, tested against selector string), reason }.

ignore.reason: Leaflet injects .leaflet-* DOM + classes at runtime on the map; never in static markup.
Leaflet marker/status variants built in JS (ServiceMapLeaflet); class names assembled at runtime.
Template-literal class `documents-dropdown--align-${align}`/`--open-${dir}` (DocumentsDropdown.jsx:129); static scan can't see the interpolated suffix.
